node.title: Gave 100+ interviews | Top 10 questions that rejected me in DSA round

article.title: Gave 100+ interviews | Top 10 questions that rejected me in DSA round
article.content:
Most of them are either greedy or stack

1. Video Stitching — https://leetcode.com/problems/video-stitching/
2. Maximum Number of Events That Can Be Attended  — https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-number-of-events-that-can-be-attended/
3. Farthest Building — https://leetcode.com/problems/furthest-building-you-can-reach/

4. Story can be rephrashed — https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-profit-in-job-scheduling/
 
5. Minimum Width Ramp — https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-width-ramp/
 
6. Minimum Insertions to Balance a Parentheses String — https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-insertions-to-balance-a-parentheses-string/
 

7. Longest Happy String — https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-happy-string/
 
8. Remove invalid parantheses— https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-invalid-parentheses/description/
 

9. Find Building Where Alice and Bob Can Meet — https://leetcode.com/problems/find-building-where-alice-and-bob-can-meet/


10. Longest Subarray With Absolute Diff ≤ Limit — https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-continuous-subarray-with-absolute-diff-less-than-or-equal-to-limit/
